description: A grafana+prometheus+freqtrade solution to monitor your trading algorithms.
Production-grade Helm chart for running Freqtrade dashboards and multi-bot fleets on Kubernetes.

The multi-bot Freqtrade dashboard. Glassmorphism design, 50+ enhanced components, fleet comparison, market context, risk overview, strategy dev UI, i18n in 6 languages. Companion to freqtrade-ultimate. Vue 3 + Pinia + TailwindCSS + ECharts. Maintained by Freqtrade France.
